name: M Bhar Atelier
bio: Our in-house curation partners with women-led workshops worldwide — each piece is handmade, ethically produced, and selected for material honesty and timeless form.

name: Woven Collective
bio: Artisan groups specialising in rattan buffets, entertainment units, and woven storage — supporting fair trade and traditional craft techniques.

name: Timber Guild
bio: Small-batch makers of dining tables, sideboards, wardrobes, and display cabinets in solid timber and marble.
